**Anne E. Wojcicki** ( / w uː ˈ tʃ ɪ t s k i / *woo- CHITS -kee* ; <sup>[[ 2 ]]()</sup> born July 28, 1973) is an American entrepreneur who co-founded the personal genomics company 23andMe .

title: Anne Wojcicki | Keynote Speaker | Chartwell Speakers Bureau
excerpts:
Section Title: Anne Wojcicki Keynote Speaker > Anne Wojcicki's Biography
Content:
**Anne Wojcicki** is an innovative biologist and the Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer (2006-2025) of the personal genomics company [23andMe](https://www.23andme.com/en-gb/) . 23andMe provides rapid genetic testing for individuals curious about their ancestry and genetic make-up, and is a platform for researchers looking for study participants. It has one of the world’s largest databases of individual genetic information.
